OQE ICOSA

Forensic twenty-face contradiction map

LIVE p31.oqeTwenty/1.0.0Static HTMLJSON lexicon
⤓ Launch OQE ICOSA ← Hub

What it is

Single machine source: /p31-oqe-twenty.json — not Fate 20 (p31.fateTwenty/1.0.0)

Single machine source: /p31-oqe-twenty.json — not Fate 20 (p31.fateTwenty/1.0.0) Forensic twenty-face contradiction map is part of the P31 Labs stack — offline-capable, edge-deployed, no dark patterns.

public/oqe-icosa.html + public/p31-oqe-twenty.json. Do not inline rows in HTML. Mesh nav: d20, lattice, hub.

Core features

  • Single machine source: /p31-oqe-twenty.json — not Fate 20 (p31.fateTwenty/1.0.0)
  • Faces 1–20 map to twenty contradiction rows; curate with counsel, not the assistive lexicon
  • No CSPRNG: choose a face to read the slot (separate from Lattice Oracle and Ultimate Decision Maker)
  • Short /oqe; Sovereign Cockpit /dome/?node=oqe-icosa; CI: verify-oqe-icosa.mjs + ground-truth routes

How to use

1Start from the red banner: shipped copy is not legal or medical advice — replace summaries with docket-cited text after review
2For assistive tie-break, open Lattice Oracle (/oracle) or the icosa Decision Maker (/d20) — different JSON contract
3Dome: open /dome/ and select the OQE Icosa node, or use ?node=oqe-icosa

Architecture

public/oqe-icosa.html + public/p31-oqe-twenty.json. Do not inline rows in HTML. Mesh nav: d20, lattice, hub.
